title: Bonney Sees Kuma’s Memories
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Saturn, Unknown person #10, York, Unknown person #11, Bonney, Unknown person #12 as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: SEVEN YEARS AGO... (When Bonney was five)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UGAHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: RUN AWAY!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: The vampire's gonna eat us!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: BONNEY (age five)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And stay out,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You Twerps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: @Leeeh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HA HA! This is as far as you can go, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I dare you to take a step out here, you ugly:) Vampire!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eat this!! Bet the Holy Cross is your weakness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look at it shine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're in a church, dummy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ahh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll show you who's boss. I'm coming after you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UWAAA AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Bonney!! stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PLEASE!! YOU CAN'T GO OUTSIDE_!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: EVEN STANDING NEAR THE DOORWAY CAN GVE YOU THE OUCHIES.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: I know! You're such a worrywart, Dad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I was just kidding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PLEASE, DON'T EVEN JOKE ABOUT IT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay... I hate it when you get all sad and worried, anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 'You're such a good kid!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Stop being such a crybaby, Dad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Those jerks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They made fun of my face stones again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Are they really that weird...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like I can help them... I didn't ask to get sick...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You mean your jewels?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're just jealous...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: ...'Cause you've got such pretty jewelry!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eh he he he he he he he! you think so?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You betcha! I love them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Bonney, if you were to go on a trip,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where would you like to go? For when you're better, I mean.?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hmm... oh, I know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you heard about the legendary Sky Islands?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That sounds like a grand adventure!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are islands way up in the air?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! I read about it in this book!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's close to the sun, so maybe we'll see Nika up there!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: You'd love that, right, Dad?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: DONDO- TO-TO!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: DONDO- TO-TO! [3]

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can go there to have a big celebration for your 20th Birthday!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where should we go for your 19th?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fishman Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After examining your daughter, I've concluded that she suffers from "Sapphire scale."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm afraid it's in- curable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You know what it is?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And sorry to ask, but can you please speak a bit quieter....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These days you almost never see it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those "stones" grow exponentially when bathed in any form of natural light, like the sun or moon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even if you completely prevent any exposure,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm afraid it's only a matter of time before the disease catches up with you....!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 56 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
